privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the requested configuration values (module 'Potentials', permission 3/Private, from role 'Sales Person', to role 'Sales Manager') exactly match the task description instructions. The test data is synthetically reset via MySQL setup scripts. However, I discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
